ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's current salary */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Player's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "average_yards_per_carry" REAL /* Average yards per carry by the player */,
  "longest_rush" INTEGER /* Longest rush by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards gained by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "sacks_yards" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "interceptions_returned" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions returned for a touchdown */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns */,
  "punt_return_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained on punt returns */,
  "kick_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kick returns */,
  "kick_return_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained on kick returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team owner, coach, analyst, player) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* User's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* User's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* User's zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_players" (
  "user_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-player association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., score, passing yards, rushing yards) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "player_season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards gained by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "sacks_yards" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "interceptions_returned" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions returned for a touchdown */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns */,
  "punt_return_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained on punt returns */,
  "kick_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kick returns */,
  "kick_return_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained on kick returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "player_game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Touchdowns scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
